name: fep_synthetic
description: Synthetic two-state FEP ladder (1D harmonic oscillators, k_first=4, k_second=1). Analytical reduced free-energy difference F_first - F_second = 0.5*ln(4) = ln(2) ~= 0.6931 kT. Reference metrics computed from simval.fep.synthetic_u_nk(seed=42, n_samples=20000) via MBAR. Oracle checks the estimator recovers deltaG and the overlap gauge passes.
